Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the music room. It seems to[n]be where the music club meets.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2081 0 0}Do you play an instrument? I play the guitar... a little.[n]{f 1 1}
